task_snapshots.title: 334d-04: Cost Burn & Performance Charts
task_snapshots.description: Implement cost analysis visualization: cost burn SVG chart over time, per-model cost breakdown bar chart, budget utilization gauge, and burn rate calculation. Build charts from cost_history API data with proper scaling and legends. Target: src/bernstein/dashboard/templates/index.html (charts-tab section) and src/bernstein/core/routes/costs.py (enhance cost_history endpoint). Completion: charts render accurately with proper scaling and real-time cost updates. [subtask of 5c08ace74a2c]
